name: Jimeng AI Image/Video MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Jimeng AI (即梦) — ByteDance's generative AI platform for creating images and videos from prompts. Enables AI agents to generate images and videos, mix images, use reference images, and create visual content programmatically through ByteDance's Jimeng AI service.
use_cases: Generating images and videos from text prompts using ByteDance's Jimeng AI
Mixing reference images for creative composition from content generation agents
Producing visual content for Chinese-market applications using a leading CN AI platform
Building image/video generation workflows using Jimeng's generative capabilities
not_for: Teams preferring Western AI platforms (DALL-E, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion)
Non-Chinese language prompt optimization (Jimeng optimized for Chinese prompts)
Teams with concerns about ByteDance/Chinese cloud data residency
best_when: A developer or content creator targeting Chinese markets wants AI agents to generate images and videos using ByteDance's Jimeng AI — particularly strong for Chinese-language prompts and aesthetics.
avoid_when: You have data residency concerns about ByteDance (Chinese tech company). Also: Jimeng is primarily a Chinese product — international availability and support may be limited.

auth.notes: Jimeng AI API key required. Jimeng account and API access needed — primarily available in China.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Jimeng AI free credits available on registration
pricing.notes: Usage-based pricing for generations. MCP server is free open source. Service primarily targets Chinese market.

performance.rate_limits: Jimeng API rate limits apply; generation time varies by complexity

known_agent_gotchas: Data residency in China (ByteDance) — review for compliance before use
Documentation primarily in Chinese — international users face translation challenges
Image/video generation is async — agents need to poll for completion
Jimeng API availability outside China may be limited
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data processed by ByteDance in China. Generated images/videos sent to Jimeng servers. Review data privacy requirements for your jurisdiction before using Chinese AI services.

security_score_components.security_notes: ByteDance/Chinese cloud data residency. Review privacy implications. Generated content processed by ByteDance servers.
